title: hieracium murorum subsp. stelligerum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. stelligerum, also known as Hill sedge hawkweed, is a rare plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the UK. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Hieracium murorum subsp. stelligerum include its ability to support immune function, reduce oxidative stress, and may aid in the management of certain health conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, have been used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
